title: Smoky Flaky Brazilian Dates Crumble
description: This plant-based dessert features smoky flavors and a flaky texture made from fine yellow cornmeal combined with dates, chia seeds, and other complementary ingredients.

ingredients.name: 3 cups fine yellow cornmeal
ingredients.notes: Coarse grinding for a crumbly texture

ingredients.name: 1 cup dried dates, pitted and chopped
½ cup chia seeds
ingredients.notes: Soaked in ¼ cup water for 5 minutes

ingredients.name: 1 cup unsweetened almond milk or any non-dairy milk
¼ cup honey or agave nectar (optional)

instructions: Mix cornmeal, dates, chia seeds, smoked paprika, and salt in a large bowl.
In another bowl, whisk flaxseed with the milk until thick, then stir in honey if using. Add this mixture to the dry ingredients and mix well.
Press crumble into an ungreased 8x8-inch baking dish or use it as a topping for individual serving bowls.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and set, shaking pan halfway through cooking time.
Let cool before serving with additional toppings like fresh fruit if desired.
